title: GUGUG Gua Sha and Jade Roller Set, Gua Sha Stone, Face Roller Massage Tool for Skin Care Routine, Guasha Tool for Face, Neck and Body Muscle
features: GUA SHA STONE: Gua Sha facial tool can shape the jawline and relieve the appearance of double chin; it also helps lymphatic drainage, and the effect will be obvious after one month of use
JADE FACE ROLLER: Jade Roller can reduce puffiness, pair with serum to promote radiant skin. If you like a cooler feeling, you can refrigerate it for a while before using
NATURAL MATERIAL: GUGUG's facial skincare set is made of natural Xiuyan material. It is easy to use and Great for your self care routine

MULTIPLE BENEFITS: The jade roller has two rollers, suitable for different positions on the face, rolling smoothly, bringing a better experience; the scraping board can not only be used as a facial massage tool, but also can be used on the whole body

FACE CARE GIFTS: This product is beautifully packaged and is the perfect gift for your loved ones, friends, and family. This product is sure to make the recipient feel special. If you have any problems with the product during use, please contact us. We will be happy to assist you.
